commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an optional `apiKey` parameter to cron model-provider preflight and sends `Authorization: Bearer <apiKey>` on the local provider probe request.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main probes local OpenAI-compatible providers with `GET /models` and no headers, and the existing mocked test already models a 401 response as reachable. I did not run a live LiteLLM cron job in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs contributor or maintainer revision for the auth-resolution blocker plus after-fix real behavior proof; ClawSweeper should not auto-repair around the missing contributor environment proof.

target.title: fix(cron): add Authorization header to provider preflight probe (GET /models)
